<onlyinclude><templatestyles src="Infobox_gear/styles.css" /><infobox theme="gear-infobox">
    <title source="name">
        <format><center>'''{{{name}}}'''{{#if: {{{gear_type|}}} | <br/><span class="gear-type-{{{gear_type}}}" style="font-size: 0.7em; font-weight: normal;">{{{gear_type}}}</span>}}{{#if: {{{type_name|}}} | <br/><span style="font-size: 0.75em; font-style: italic; font-weight: normal;">{{{type_name}}}</span>}}</format>
    </title>
    <image source="icon">
        <format>[[File:{{{icon}}}|center|alt=Icon of {{{name}}}]]</format>
    </image>
    <panel>
        <data source="grid_size">
            <label>Upgrade Grid</label>
            <format>{{{grid_size}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="skin_count">
            <label>Skins</label>
            <format>{{{skin_count}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="max_level">
            <label>Max Level</label>
            <format>{{{max_level}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="min_unlock_level">
            <label>Min Unlock Level</label>
            <format>{{{min_unlock_level}}}</format>
        </data>{{#if: {{{api_name|}}} |
        <section collapse="closed">
            <header>Technical Information</header>
            <data source="api_name">
                <label>API Name</label>
                <format><code>{{{api_name}}}</code></format>
            </data>
        </section>}}
    </panel>
</infobox></onlyinclude>
==Documentation==
This template displays a gear (weapon, throwable, utility item, vehicle, or custom equipment) in a Portable Infobox.

==How to Use==
<pre>
{{Infobox gear
|name = Display name (e.g. "The Accelerator")
|api_name = Internal APIName (e.g. "accelerator")
|gear_type = Primary | Heavy | Throwable | Utility | Vehicle | Custom
|type_name = Subtype description (e.g. "Accelerating Burst SMG")
|icon = Icon filename
|grid_size = Upgrade grid dimensions (e.g. "5×5")
|skin_count = Number of skins
|max_level = Max XP level
|min_unlock_level = Player level required to unlock
}}
</pre>

==Example Usage==
<pre>
{{Infobox gear
|name = The Accelerator
|api_name = accelerator
|gear_type = Primary
|type_name = Accelerating Burst SMG
|icon = The_Accelerator_icon.png
|grid_size = 5×5
|skin_count = 12
|max_level = 30
|min_unlock_level = 0
}}
</pre>
===Result===
{{Infobox gear
|name = The Accelerator
|api_name = accelerator
|gear_type = Primary
|type_name = Accelerating Burst SMG
|icon = The_Accelerator_icon.png
|grid_size = 5×5
|skin_count = 12
|max_level = 30
|min_unlock_level = 0
}}

[[Category:Templates]]
